message:
feat(serve): add audit trail system with SQLite and JSONL persistence

Implement comprehensive audit logging for REST and WebSocket actions:

Infrastructure:
- AuditStore with dual persistence: SQLite for queries, JSONL for
  append-only durability
- Configurable retention period with automatic cleanup goroutine
- Thread-safe recording with mutex protection

Audit Records capture:
- Request metadata (ID, method, path, status, duration)
- User context (ID, role, session)
- Resource context (type, ID, action type)
- Session tracking (pane, agent, approval IDs)
- Client info (remote addr, user agent)

Middleware integration:
- AuditMiddleware auto-records all mutating requests (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE)
- Handler helpers to enrich context: SetAuditResource, SetAuditSession,
  SetAuditAction, SetAuditDetails, SetAuditApproval
- Specialized recorders: RecordApprovalAction, RecordWebSocketAction

Query support:
- Filter by user, action, resource, session, request ID, approval ID
- Time range filtering (since/until)
- Pagination with limit/offset

Test coverage includes store lifecycle, recording, querying, and cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
